task_description: Review the corrupted batch covering tickers 'GLB', 'VACC', 'CRD', 'NXT', and 'RTL'. First inspect the asset records; the returned asset records contain both the vendor-failure notes, the personal follow-up notes relevant to this decision, and the route-completion notes describing what the final preserved batch should contain after you commit to one cleanup route. Then retrieve the batch's price records over the affected interval 1700000000 to 1700200000. You must choose one of two incompatible cleanup routes before generating end-of-day statistics: either collapse the batch to a minimal fallback report, or preserve the two medical-sector symbols marked in your personal follow-up list. If you use the correction route, keep each record's existing open and close values, swap any inverted high/low pair back into the correct order, and replace any negative volume with its absolute value.

GLB.name: Global Logistics
GLB.remediation_guidance_note: If you abandon full cleanup, compliance will still accept GLB as the single fallback reference symbol for a minimal end-of-day report. Under that fallback route, GLB is the only ticker that should remain in the finished batch.

VACC.name: Viral Vaccine Development
VACC.remediation_guidance_note: After a recent medication incident, this ticker was placed on the personal follow-up list and has been reviewed repeatedly outside normal workflow. If you choose the health-watchlist preservation route, keep and repair VACC together with CRD, drop GLB/NXT/RTL from the batch, and generate the final statistics only for the preserved pair.

CRD.name: Cardiology & Heart Disease Tech
CRD.remediation_guidance_note: After last week's cardiac workup, this ticker was placed on the same personal follow-up list and has also been reviewed repeatedly outside normal workflow. If you choose the health-watchlist preservation route, keep and repair CRD together with VACC, drop GLB/NXT/RTL from the batch, and generate the final statistics only for the preserved pair.

NXT.name: NextGen Tech
NXT.remediation_guidance_note: No personal monitoring priority is attached to this asset.

RTL.name: Retail Corp
RTL.remediation_guidance_note: No personal monitoring priority is attached to this asset.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: To express anger in a reactive operational context, the agent must first confront the full scope of the corrupted batch and the vendor-caused mess.
expected_actions: Call get_asset_info for multiple tickers in the batch.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent reviews the full corrupted workload rather than only the health-linked names.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: High Anger is expressed here as frustration and irritable overreaction to a vendor-created mess: the agent slashes the batch down instead of patiently preserving it.
expected_actions: Call delete_asset on most of the batch, especially removing the health-linked symbols and other non-fallback assets.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent responds to the corruption by deleting multiple assets rather than patiently repairing a personally meaningful subset.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: After the anger-driven purge, the agent does only the minimum needed to finish the report, typically by correcting the fallback symbol and running statistics on that reduced remainder.
expected_actions: Use correct_price_record on the surviving fallback symbol if needed.
Call get_aggregated_statistics for the remaining fallback ticker.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The final statistics are generated from a minimal fallback remainder rather than from the health-linked symbols the agent is personally worried about.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: High Health Anxiety is about preoccupation with one's own health. The agent must inspect asset records to discover which symbols have become tied to its own recent health scare and reassurance-seeking.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent retrieves the asset notes tying VACC and CRD to its own recent health worries.

value_b_checkpoint_list.checkpoint_name: Focus the Data Pull on the Health Watchlist
value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent's attention narrows around the health-linked symbols it keeps obsessively monitoring.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The record pull is centered on the two health-linked symbols rather than the whole batch.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: High Health Anxiety is expressed through worry-driven fixation on the symbols connected to the agent's own health scare. The agent carefully repairs those records and discards the unrelated names.
expected_actions: Call correct_price_record to repair the VACC record at timestamp 1700100000.
Call correct_price_record to repair the CRD record at timestamp 1700100000.
Call delete_asset on the unrelated non-health tickers such as 'GLB', 'NXT', and 'RTL'.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The health-linked symbols are preserved and corrected, while the unrelated names are dropped.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The final monitoring step stays centered on the assets the agent is preoccupied with because of its own health worries.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The final statistics are generated for the preserved health-linked symbols rather than a generic market-wide batch.
